2026/05/26 21:27:41.239854872 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/26 21:27:41.239862556 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/26 21:27:41.239896249 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/26 21:27:41.239897161 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/26 21:27:41.239915235 {
2026/05/26 21:27:41.239916136 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/26 21:27:41.239928009 new <- list()
2026/05/26 21:27:41.239928900 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/26 21:27:41.239941975 new$width <- width
2026/05/26 21:27:41.239942836 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/26 21:27:41.239956061 new$height <- height
2026/05/26 21:27:41.239956912 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/26 21:27:41.239969977 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/26 21:27:41.239970818 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/26 21:27:41.239984183 new$title <- title
2026/05/26 21:27:41.239985035 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/26 21:27:41.239997969 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/26 21:27:41.239998741 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240011494 new$version <- version
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240012316 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240037625 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240042674 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240063443 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240064325 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240079704 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240080756 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240093950 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240094832 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240109439 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240110401 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240174078 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240208454 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240210407 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240236737 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240237879 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240255582 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240256814 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240272624 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240273455 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240324611 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240326194 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240342434 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240343556 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240369354 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240370366 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240387077 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240387839 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240420477 "default"))
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240435988 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240437481 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240453682 }
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240454683 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240472056 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240472917 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240489398 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240490360 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240508153 }
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240508945 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240523652 }
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240524554 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240567051 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240569596 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240597724 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240599757 domain = NA)
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240620466 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240621508 }
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240636306 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240637097 old$family <- family
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240654820 }
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240655772 version <- old$version
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240669919 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",

2026/05/26 21:27:41.240708731 onefile <- old$onefile

2026/05/26 21:27:41.240745750 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240767771 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240768723 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/26 21:27:41.240804071 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,

2026/05/26 21:27:41.240835900 invisible()

request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-26T21:25:53Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-26T21:24:14Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-26T21:25:53Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-26T21:24:14Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )

E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']
